tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]B[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
Blame it on the rain[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
Blame it on the stars[/tab]

[ch]F#[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]
  You said you didn't need her,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
  you told her goodbye,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
  you sacrificed a good love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  to satisfy your pride.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                [ch]Eb[/ch]
  Now you wished that you should have her,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  and you feel like such a fool.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]
  You let her walk away, now it just don't feel the same.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
  Gotta blame it on something, gotta blame it on something.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
Blame it on the rain that was falling, falling,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]
blame it on the stars that did shine at night.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G#m[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever you do, don't put the blame on you,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]

[tab]          [ch]F#[/ch]
You can blame it on the rain.[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]Eb[/ch]
  Should've told her you were sorry,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
  could have said you were wrong.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]Eb[/ch]
  But no, you couldn't do that,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
  you had to prove you were strong, oo.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]
  If you hadn't been so blinded,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
  she might still be there with you.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]
  You want her back again, but she just don't feel the same.[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C#m[/ch]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]
  Gotta blame it on something, gotta blame it on something.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]
Blame it on the rain that was falling, falling,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]
blame it on the stars that did shine at night.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G#m[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever you do, don't put the blame on you,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]

[tab]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I wanna blame it on the rain.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]C#[/ch]    [ch]C#[/ch]    [ch]C#[/ch]
‘Cause the rain don't mind![/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]    [ch]G#[/ch]
And the rain don't care,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]
you got to blame it on something.[/tab]

[Chorus] (up one half-step)
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I can't, I can't stand the rain[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Blame it on the rain that was falling, falling,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
blame it on the stars that did shine at night.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Whatever you do, don't put the blame on you,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
blame it on the rain, yeah, yeah![/tab]
